code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Education_LMS_Portal] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Education_StudentDB] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Education_ClassroomService] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Education_GradeSync]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Education_StudentDB] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Education_StudentDB] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Education_GradeSync] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Education_StudentDB]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Education_ContentCDN] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Education_ClassroomService]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Education_ContentCDN] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Education_StudentDB]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Education_ContentCDN] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Education_LMS_Portal)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Education_ContentCDN]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Education_ContentCDN]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个虚拟宠物洗衣机的状态机，核心流程是：宠物创建后进入Idle状态，点击开始洗涤后进入Washing，洗完烘干，最后折叠完成整个周期。
明白了。Washing阶段需要计时器吗？我看到您提到了TimerRunning，这个计时器是怎么工作的？
对，Washing里嵌套一个TimerRunning子状态，每0.5秒触发CalculateRemaining计算剩余时间。如果剩余时间大于0就回到TimerRunning，小于等于0就进入TimerComplete。
好的，Washing的结构我画好了。TimerRunning里面还需要保存状态对吧？我看到有SaveState和UpdateUI的循环。
没错，SaveState要存endTime、类型和petID到UserDefaults，然后UpdateUI刷新界面，这两个状态循环直到计时结束。
TimerComplete的处理我设计为：先CancelTimer取消定时器，然后ClearState清理状态，SendNotification发送通知，最后回到GradeSync。这样行吗？
可以，Washing结束后进入WashComplete，然后用户点击开始烘干进入Drying。Drying的结构和Washing类似，也有TimerRunning2和CalculateRemaining2。
Drying画好了，TimerRunning2里的SaveState2存的是.dry类型。TimerComplete2处理完后回到StudentDB。烘干结束到DryComplete，然后进入Folding等待用户折叠。
用户点击折叠后进入CycleComplete，这个状态很重要：要更新宠物健康值到100，状态变成happy，记录lastLaundryDate，增加cyclesCompleted，还要更新连续记录。
CycleComplete的流程是：UpdatePetHealth → UpdateStats → ClearNotifications → SaveDatabase → ClassroomService，最后回到Idle？
对的。但还有个关键需求：App重新打开时要能恢复状态。Washing和Drying都要能触发RecoveryCheck。
RecoveryCheck我加了：LoadUserDefaults读取数据，ValidateState验证endTime是否存在、是否合理，然后CalculateActualRemaining计算实际剩余时间，最后到StudentDB。
RecoveryCheck之后要根据实际情况分流：如果洗涤计时还在运行就回Washing，已过期就回WashComplete；烘干同理。如果数据损坏就回Idle。
健康衰减机制怎么设计？我看到Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete都会随着时间触发HealthDecay。
HealthDecay里先CheckLastLaundry检查上次洗衣时间，然后CalculateHealth计算健康值：用天数差除以期望周期频率，健康值=100乘以这个比例。然后UpdateState更新状态。
健康状态分段我理解对吗？100-75%是Happy，75-50%是Neutral，50-25%是Sad，25-1%是Very Sad，0%就变成Dead？
完全正确。HealthDecay正常结束回Idle，如果健康值归零就进入Dead状态，宠物死亡，指向ContentCDN。
整个状态机基本完成了。我在Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete旁边加了注释说明各自的状态特征，方便理解。
起点确认一下：宠物创建后是从Education_GradeSync进入Idle，对吧？
是的，[Education_GradeSync] -- Idle: Pet Created。整个流程验证过了，从创建到Idle，经过Washing、WashComplete、Drying、DryComplete、Folding、CycleComplete，最后回到Idle，还有RecoveryCheck和HealthDecay两条支线，结构完整。
